title: iboza multiflora
intro: Iboza multiflora, also known as the Lantana camara, is a flowering plant native to the Americas and widely distributed across the globe. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iboza multiflora include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its role in reducing fever and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
